sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29193" key="dusle/antos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσ-λέαντος</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">λεαίνω</etym>) <sense id="n29193.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to pound</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bray</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg003:184" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.184</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
